creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
To add…

I’m running 11.0-CURRENTSEPT2015 (PC-BSD) on a Lenovo ThinkPad T440 with an Intel 7260ac.

Here is some sample output:
# sysctl net.wlan.devices
net.wlan.devices:
# cd /boot/kernel
# kldload iwm7260fw.ko
# kldload if_iwm.ko
# sysctl net.wlan.devices
net.wlan.devices: iwm0

Only my ethernet (em0) is present in “PC-BSD Network Manager”.  The only devices shown with `ifconfig -a` are em0 and lo0.
This thread shows more of my setup and is what lead me to this bug report: https://forums.pcbsd.org/thread-20252.html
